workload.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples multistage stable-fluids compute contract. Both sides execute the same deterministic seed, advection, divergence, Jacobi pressure, projection, and dye update command stream under the runtime compare harness.
workload.description: Deterministic multistage stable-fluids workload with a 256x256 grid, 18 Jacobi pressure iterations per simulation step, and 4 full solver steps over velocity and dye fields.
workload.name: stable fluids multistage 256 grid 18 pressure 4 steps

workloadManifest.freshnessReason: manifest differs from generated lane amd_vulkan in backend workload catalog
